calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Advanced From Jan-13-14 To Oct-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Vennie Forks.

The Court stated that when looking at the Spousal Property Petition, the amendment and the underlying facts, that it is easiest to address this issue by way of a Spousal Property Petition. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The Ex Parte Petition for Letters of Special Administration in case number PES-13-297230 is off calendar. Mr. Dobrov will file a dismissal with regard to the Petition for Letters of Administrator.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Vennie Forks (Petitioner in Pro Per). Carol Pefley (Friend/Realtor).

The Court advised Mrs. Forks that the petition in its form can not be granted, that she will need to file an Amended Petition to include checking of box 1b and to provide further evidence to support her claim. Ms. Pefley stated that Mrs. Forks is up against deadline to refinance to avoid foreclosure. The matter was continued to Novemer 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date
